mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_property_af_from_sms (orderCodeReal, projectName, marketCode, officeCode, expendId, marketName, officeName, systemName, salesManCode, systemid, industryid, salesManName, expendName, industryName, channelName, engineeFee, objId, applyType, corporationCode, finalCustomerName, pspm, pspmName, salesMenTel, decPath, requireInDate, receiveMen, reveiveContactWay, receiveAddress, projectType, projectCode, serviceTypeName, customerProjectName, agentName, lendCause) values
(#{item.orderCodeReal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expendId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.marketName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.salesManCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.systemid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.industryid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.salesManName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expendName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.channelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.engineeFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.applyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.finalCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pspm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pspmName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.salesMenTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.decPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.requireInDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.receiveMen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reveiveContactWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.projectCode,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.serviceTypeName,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{item.customerProjectName,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{item.agentName,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{item.lendCause,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = VALUES(id), orderCodeReal = VALUES(orderCodeReal), projectName = VALUES(projectName), marketCode = VALUES(marketCode), officeCode = VALUES(officeCode), expendId = VALUES(expendId), marketName = VALUES(marketName), officeName = VALUES(officeName), systemName = VALUES(systemName), salesManCode = VALUES(salesManCode), systemid = VALUES(systemid), industryid = VALUES(industryid), salesManName = VALUES(salesManName), expendName = VALUES(expendName), industryName = VALUES(industryName), channelName = VALUES(channelName), engineeFee = VALUES(engineeFee), objId = VALUES(objId), applyType = VALUES(applyType), corporationCode = VALUES(corporationCode), finalCustomerName = VALUES(finalCustomerName), pspm = VALUES(pspm), pspmName = VALUES(pspmName), salesMenTel = VALUES(salesMenTel), decPath = VALUES(decPath), requireInDate = VALUES(requireInDate), receiveMen = VALUES(receiveMen), reveiveContactWay = VALUES(reveiveContactWay), receiveAddress = VALUES(receiveAddress), projectType = VALUES(projectType), projectCode = VALUES(projectCode), serviceTypeName = VALUES(serviceTypeName), customerProjectName = VALUES(customerProjectName), agentName = VALUES(agentName), lendCause = VALUES(lendCause)

insert into pm_project_product_af_from_sms (projectCode, orderCodereal, corporationCode, ssfrId, productCode, productfirstCode, productName, productfirstName, productsubCode, productSubModel, productSubName, num, borrowNum) values
(#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderCodereal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.corporationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ssfrId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productfirstCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productfirstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productsubCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSubModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSubName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.borrowNum,jdbcType=INTEGER})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = VALUES(id), projectCode = VALUES(projectCode), orderCodereal = VALUES(orderCodereal), corporationCode = VALUES(corporationCode), ssfrId = VALUES(ssfrId), productCode = VALUES(productCode), productfirstCode = VALUES(productfirstCode), productName = VALUES(productName), productfirstName = VALUES(productfirstName), productsubCode = VALUES(productsubCode), productSubModel = VALUES(productSubModel), productSubName = VALUES(productSubName), num = VALUES(num), borrowNum = VALUES(borrowNum)

insert into pm_project_property_af_from_sms ( `orderExecNumber`, `projectCode`, `projectName`, `salesManCode`, `salesManName`, `marketCode`, `marketName`, `systemId`, `systemName`, `expendId`, `expendName`, `industryId`, `industryName`, `officeCode`, `officeName`, `serviceTypeName`, `channelName`, `engineeFee`, `objId`, `applyType`, `corporationCode`, `customerProjectName`, `finalCustomerName`, `agentName`, projectType ) select ppfs.`orderExecNumber`, ppfs.`projectCode`, `projectName`, `salesManCode`, `salesManName`, `marketCode`, `marketName`, `systemId`, `systemName`, `expendId`, `expendName`, `industryId`, `industryName`, `officeCode`, `officeName`, `serviceTypeName`, `channelName`, `engineeFee`, `objId`, `applyType`, ppfs.`corporationCode`, `customerProjectName`, `finalCustomerName`, `agentName`, "afss" as projectType from `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs left join `pm_project_product_af_from_sms` ppfd on ppfs.`orderExecNumber` = ppfd.`orderExecNumber` and ppfs.`projectCode` = ppfd.`projectCode` where FIND_IN_SET(ppfd.`productfirstCode`, #{_parameter})
